assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures opt.UserInteraction.LogoutUrl to a specific logout path
A logout page calls GetLogoutContextAsync(logoutId) to retrieve the logout context
assertions.rationale: The logout page does not inject IIdentityServerInteractionService or call GetLogoutContextAsync.

assertions.assertion: The logout page calls HttpContext.SignOutAsync to end the authentication session
The logout page uses context.SignOutIFrameUrl for front-channel logout iframe rendering
assertions.rationale: The page does not use SignOutIFrameUrl or render any iframe.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to 'https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel'
assertions.rationale: The web.app client does not have BackChannelLogoutUri configured.
